title: codonopsis javanica subsp. japonica
intro: Codonopsis javanica subsp. japonica, also known as Dong Quai or Japanese Codonopsis, is a type of flowering plant in the Campanulaceae family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Codonopsis javanica subsp. japonica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
